content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally across sectors — IT (COFORGE +11%), capital goods (TITAGARH +9.8%, GRSE +9.2%), chemicals (SRF +6.85%, NAVINFLUOR +3.7%), FMCG (MARICO ATH), financials (ABCAPITAL +6.6%, CAMS +10.5%) — confirms strong sector rotation backdrop. Most held positions are showing immediate gains from entry. Global cues supportive (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on the winners, not chase new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. SL is already at 1035 (above entry, BE+ locked). Per trail mandate (b): trail level = max(984, 1056.70*0.98) = 1035.57. Current SL 1035 is essentially at trail level already. Keeping SL at 1035 (gap to CMP ~2.0% — within 1% floor discipline). No-op-equivalent: SL stays, target stays. Actually emitting HOLD instead of micro-MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: SL 1035 already locks BE+5%, gap to CMP 1056.70 is ~2.1% (above 1% trail-gap floor). No micro-adjust needed. Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, Rs 8 dividend. Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. MACD bearish, but holding as geopolitical hedge. SL 121 = -3.3% (within budget). No change to SL/target — emitting as HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "ADANIPORTS CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4% unrealized. Per trail mandate (b): with +3.4% gain, raise SL above breakeven. Trail level = max(1700, 1757.10*0.98) = 1721.96. New SL 1730 sits 1.55% below CMP (above 1% floor). Tightening from prior 1720. Q4 strong (revenue >Rs 10k cr first-time, intl EBITDA +180%). Target 1820 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "HAL CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Trail SL up from 4540 to 4575 (breakeven lock). Gap to CMP = 1.2% (just above 1% floor). NOTE: Q4 board meeting May 14 — 5 sessions away, outside the 3-session binary cutoff today but approaching. Will reassess and exit/trim if catalyst nears within 3 sessions. Target 4875 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6905.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "NAVINFLUOR CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL 6905 is BE+5 already. Gap to CMP = 2.0% (above floor). Q4 revenue +34%, FY26 PAT +130%, near 52w high. No change to SL/target — emitting HOLD instead via position_actions to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "TITAGARH CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Q4 results pending in May (binary risk). SL move from 836 to 828 — wait, this LOOSENS SL. Reject. Keeping SL 836; gap to CMP = 1.1%. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08%. Q4 PAT +30.6%, NBFC AUM +27%, fresh ATH. Tightening SL from 363 to 365 (still below entry — moderate trail). Gap to CMP = 1.0% — at floor edge. Target 388 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Fresh ATH on Q4 print, 22% revenue growth, 9% India volume. SL 815 already at -0.6% from entry. No change. HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Tighten SL from 1253 to 1259 (breakeven lock). Gap to CMP = 1.6% (above 1% floor). Q4 PAT +130%, revenue +29%, $1.75B order book. Target 1330 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "GRSE CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Tighten SL from 2980 to 2990 (~1.45% below CMP, above 1% floor). Q4 PAT +24%, revenue +29%. Target 3225 unchanged. Defense cluster note: HAL+GRSE are 2 names already; no further defense additions today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CAMS CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. Surged 9% intraday on Q4 (record EBITDA margin 46.5%). SL 800 already at -0.74% from entry. Gap to CMP = 0.9% — slightly tight; widening trail risk acceptable here as just-entered. Keep SL 800, target 855. HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Open MIS BUY LIMIT @ 133.50 has been pending 1827 minutes (>30 hours, multi-session). This is stale and well past today's 14:30 cutoff for new MIS entries. CANCEL — original setup is no longer valid in current market context."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% unrealized, SL already at BE+5%, gap to CMP 2.1%. Hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "-0.8% unrealized, gold hedge, SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.4% gain — trail SL above breakeven to 1730 per trail mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% gain — move SL to breakeven. Watch May 14 board meeting; will exit/trim if catalyst enters 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6905.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, SL at BE+5, no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, SL at -0.2% (BE-ish), Q4 pending. Will not loosen SL. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat unrealized, but strong Q4 narrative. Slight trail from 363 to 365."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, ATH breakout, SL just under entry. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% gain — trail SL to breakeven, lock no-loss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% — minor tighten from 2980 to 2990, defense cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.16%, just entered, record EBITDA margin Q4. SL already tight at -0.74%."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups exist (SRF Q4 +47% FY PAT, LAURUSLABS record EBITDA, POLYCAB Q4 beat) but the book is already 11 CNC positions and broadly deployed. Cluster discipline: defense (HAL+GRSE), capital goods (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH), financials (ABCAPITAL+CAMS+PNBHOUSING) — no new same-cluster adds today. Will revisit SRF/LAURUSLABS/POLYCAB tomorrow if any current position hits target/SL and frees capital.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed across 11 CNC names showing immediate green ink across nearly all entries (broad sector rally bid). Today's job: protect gains via trailing SLs, not chase new entries. HAL board meeting May 14 = 5 sessions away — flagged for monitoring; will trim/exit when within 3 sessions per binary-event discipline. TITAGARH Q4 also pending in May — same flag. HFCL stale MIS limit being cancelled (multi-session pending). Cumulative P&L still -53.72% from start; execution discipline (trail-gap floor, R:R consistency, no-op MODIFY avoidance) is the focus now, not new directional bets."
}
